about.title: About
about.description: FL!P - The ultimate drinking game to spice up your parties with friends!

suggest.label: Suggest a question
suggest.hint: Got an idea for a question or phrase for a game?
suggest.title: Suggest a question
suggest.placeholder: E.g. "Have you ever eaten standing up over the sink?"
suggest.successDesc: We'll read your suggestion carefully. The best questions make it into the game 🤞
suggest.errorDesc: Could not send your suggestion. Check your connection and try again.

drinks.title: Drinking game mode
drinks.label: Hand out sips
drinks.description: Enable sips distribution across games to turn Fl!p into a real drinking game.
drinks.lockedHint: Unlock Premium to enable drinking game mode

tiktok.title: Win 1 year of VIP
tiktok.label: Make a TikTok, win 1 year of VIP
tiktok.hint: Post a Fl!p video that passes 1,000 likes 🎁
tiktok.pitch: Create a TikTok about Fl!p. If it gets more than 1,000 likes, we'll gift you a year of VIP. It's that simple.

steps.1: Post an original TikTok about Fl!p

tiktok.successDesc: We'll review your video and get back to you to activate your VIP year. Thanks for helping Fl!p grow 💛
tiktok.errorDesc: Could not send your request. Check your connection and try again.
